use_cases: Serve as an animated 3D hero background for landing pages and marketing sites
Provide immersive visual appeal for tech and SaaS product presentations
Enhance creative portfolio and agency website hero sections with generative art
Create memorable first impressions for digital product launches
Offer shader-based animated backgrounds for conference or event sites
ai_summary: A hero component featuring a 3D generative art scene with an icosahedron geometry rendered via Three.js and custom GLSL shaders. The animation uses Perlin noise for organic vertex displacement with time-based uniforms, creating an anomalous matter effect. Includes point lighting and HSL color theming through CSS variables. Perfect for creating visually striking, immersive hero sections on landing pages and product showcases.
